not so important but kinda important sub message

Also. I realize that a few creators on this website have quit or done worse things uh, I am fine like genuinely, I lowkey wish there was a more ecological way to run these bots but I also don't think janitorai is the main issue of water pollution and waste when in reality its Billionaires and Mega corporations making the population have to catch up their slack, still if it gets to a point I might just set up a roleplay server and give out prompts but then I'm so antisocial ugh.

I'm only saying that because I saw a few people pretending they were taking the moral high ground on this and leave calling their audience sick fucks despite them having made the bots and I wanna say if I ever did quit I don't think it be for any of the reasons and I wouldn't treat the people who have used my bots as criminals or like ecological terrorist?

Although if I am contributing to an addiction please understand I'd prefer yall picked recovery and that me cutting off people from my bots won't do anything. Just don't want anyone to feel guilty about not recovering fully just yet (for those this concern)
